response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages (including Python, JavaScript, D, C++, and C), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for the Principal role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and Python-relevant languages
Proven ability to design and ship open-source infrastructure tools (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong systems thinking demonstrated in distributed, high-throughput services and DevOps setup
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation/feature-flagging platforms at scale
Limited visibility into metrics, telemetry, or statistical analysis experience for growth systems
Role history shows individual contributor strength but minimal evidence of cross-team technical leadership at IC6 level

key_factors.factor: Ambiguous leadership scope at IC6 level
